MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Denis Huston for Cathleen Huston (Executor)

Mr. Huston stated that delay is due to an issue with the Inventory and Appraisal, he just received a corrected version yesterday, it should be filed this morning, and the report should be filed by the end of this month. The Status on close of estate is continued to May 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
